## Test checklist

- [ ] `mvn test -Punit` passes
- [ ] `mvn test -Ppersistence` passes
- [ ] `mvn test -Pintegration` passes
- [ ] New or changed code is covered by at least one `@Tag("unit")` test
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or real API tokens committed
- [ ] No `System.out.println` or debug statements left in
